title: 有馬記念の後に・顔を上げれば

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I lost... It was close, though.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. It's not a bad result. I know that...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But... I heard them. I heard everyone cheering for
me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You'd think it's impossible, right? But it's true!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I usually only hear my heartbeat, breath, and the
sound of the wind...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But today, I could clearly hear their voices saying,
"Keep going, Natie!"

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
My whole body was giving out, but those words
kept me going... and made this race so, so much
fun!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's why I wanted to rise to the occasion... and
win for those cheering me on.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I wanted to win this race... The race where I could finally hear their voices.

For Nice Nature, her deep connection with her
supporters has made this Arima Kinen a special
race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I want to repay their support next year, on this
very track!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, what am I saying?! I'm getting waaay
ahead of myself.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But hearing those cheers did feel really good...

Indeed, it's a little too early to aim for next year's
Arima Kinen. This year's race literally just ended,
after all.

But I want to maintain her current level of
motivation, so the best race for that would be...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Isn't the Takarazuka Kinen roster based on a fan
poll too?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Same as the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I never thought I'd say something as cheesy as
"my fans are my greatest strength," but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: These fan-based races do seem to make me stronger... All right, I want to compete in the Takarazuka Kinen!

That being said, we still have a fair amount of
time before the Takarazuka Kinen. We decide to
spend that time racing and training.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right... But, first...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I need to reflect on what I can improve on.

Nice Nature repeats these words to herself as she
looks back at the other runners who ran with her
in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Do you have a floppy trophy for me today?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe, thank you. Let's do a review of the race
first.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I think I wasn't paying enough attention to the
runners around me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I was so fixated on the gap between me and Teio
that I forgot that there were other runners.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The race today really made me aware of that. Not
exactly a groundbreaking discovery, but
everyone was a top-tier runner.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I can't even win now, and the competition will
only continue to get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I have to get better. Now isn't the time to fuss
over if I can beat Teio.

For better or worse, Nice Nature's eyes have been
on only Tokai Teio, the leader of their
generation.

However, it seems that competing against various
generations in the Arima Kinen has broadened
her horizons. This is great progress!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I have to learn more about the other runners!

On the way home, that opportunity comes earlier
than we anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen! Let's do our review session together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's fine. Then shall we find someplace to—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No need for that! Let's go home and talk while we
work out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: N-now?! I'm not sure about that...

Mejiro McQueen and Mejiro Ryan... These two
were among the racers who ran with Nice Nature
today, yet they seem so laid-back.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Those two...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait here for a sec, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh? Hello, Nature.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It was nice racing against you earlier. I'm glad I
could witness just how fast you truly are.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No kidding! You were so fast out there, it gave us
all a good workout!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... want to ask you two something!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: How do you two stay so... strong?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...I know it's out of place for me to ask something
like this, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how to describe it. It's like... you
both seem to be standing on your own two feet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's an interesting way to put it.
"Standing on my own two feet," huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What do you think, McQueen? You're better than
me at this whole "giving advice" thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Why must you always leave these kinds of things to me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But, if you insist, we can show you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, I don't intend to spell out every last
detail for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We'll show you something more affirmative than
words. That will probably be all you need.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's right! Come over anytime!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: As for me, I'll train you hard if you want me to!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan's training is quite rigorous, so be prepared.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah, noted...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now then, have a good day. Until next time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, it's okay if we do our review session at the
gym, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That proposal is rejected!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
More affirmative than words... I wonder what she
meant.

Sensing more growth on the horizon, Nice
Nature's classic year comes to an end.
